projectDescription: Install and manage OpenClaw AI assistant on Android devices using Termux without root access.
keyFeatures: One-liner installation script for OpenClaw on Android via Termux
No root access required - works on any Android device
Automatic path patching for Android compatibility
Safe update script that preserves configurations
Access to hardware sensors (GPS, camera, mic, accelerometer)
publicApiSurface: setup_claw.sh - Complete installation and environment setup
update_claw.sh - Safe update with configuration preservation
sv status openclaw - Check service status
sv up openclaw - Start OpenClaw service
sv down openclaw - Stop OpenClaw service
termux-wake-lock - Keep CPU awake for background operation
